assertions.details: Imported issues (TST-1, TST-2) retain original createdAt/updatedAt timestamps from export fixture. TST-1: createdAt=2024-06-15T09:30:00.000Z, updatedAt=2024-07-20T14:45:00.000Z. TST-2: createdAt=2023-12-01T00:00:00.000Z, updatedAt=2025-01-15T18:30:00.000Z. All timestamps match exactly.
Imported users (Alice Timestamp, Bob Validator) retain name and email fields. Users are queryable via the root `users` query and correctly linked as assignees to their imported issues.
